---
title: "Efficiency+ General Meeting"
subtitle: "March 25, 2026"
author: "ASA BIOP SWG"
format:
 revealjs:
  table-of-contents: true
  toc-depth: 1
  toc-title: Agenda
  revealjs-theme: simple
  incremental: false
  scrollable: true
  embed-resources: true
  footer: "Efficiency+"
  css: styles.css
slide-number: true
---

<style>
.reveal .footer {
  color: red !important;
}
</style>

## Welcome New Members

| Name | Affiliation | Introduced By |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| Kristen Daniels | BI — Executive Director, Early Asset TA Lead | Dooti Roy |
| Kristen Leraas | JNJ Vision Med Tech — Associate Director, Clinical Operations | Jessica Cannon-Hill |
| Leanne Goldstein | Amgen | Crystal Shaw |
| Maria Pia Beccar-Varela | UTEP | Clara Cali Mella |
| Maria Cristina Mariani | UTEP | Clara Cali Mella |
| Meilin Jiang | Lilly | Forrest Williamson |

## Topic Sub Team Update

- Clara Cali Mella — Patient Recruitment Monitoring & Forecasting, Site Selection
- Palanikumar Ravindran — Dynamic Trial Monitoring / Data Quality
- Dooti Roy — Study Design and Operations Impact
- Christi Kleoudis — Clinical Supply Chain

## Social Media

- Crystal Shaw and Leanne Goldstein to lead social media efforts

## JSM Efficiency+ Lunch

- Tuesday 8/2, 12:00–1:00 PM
- Alternative: RISW (can do only one)

## ASA Report

- Summarize recent progress, achievements, or ongoing work
- Can cover how the group was formed, motivation, and ambition
- Promotion opportunity: LinkedIn, AMSTAT newsletter, ASA conferences
- Reference: [ASA BIOP Report on Substack](https://asabiopreport.substack.com)

## Conferences

| Conference | Details |
|------------|---------|
| IBC2026 | Replacement speakers needed (see next slide) |
| RTSM | Upper Providence, PA, May 12–13 (discussant) |
| SCOPE-EU | October |
| SLDS | November, Brooklyn |
| SCT | Annual Meeting |

## IBC2026 — Replacement Speakers Needed

- **Session 1**: Data-Driven Decision Making: The Role of Statistical Modeling in Improving Clinical Trial Success
- **Session 2**: Integrating GenAI-Enabled Machine Learning Models for Optimization of Clinical Trial Operations and Success Metrics

## SWG Deliverables

- **Special issue**: Journal outreach effort
- **Unified spec-driven framework** for team deliverables
